display_text: Stout Shield, Cost: 100: Provides a 50% chance to block 20 damage from melee attacks and 8 damage from ranged attacks. Core early game survivability item for melee heroes, significantly reducing harass damage in lane. Multiple sources of damage block do not stack.

display_text: Stout Shield, Cost: 100: No attributes provided. Provides only defensive passive. Useful baseline for upgrading into Vanguard or Pavise.

display_text: Stout Shield, Cost: 100: Provides early damage mitigation to survive laning phase, especially for melee heroes against heavy physical harass. Reduces trading damage taken, improving lane staying power and efficiency.
search_text: early game item, laning survival, harass counter, melee sustain, starting item, offlane survival, lane defense, Stout Shield

display_text: Stout Shield, Cost: 100: Strong against high-attack-frequency enemies and summons that deal low physical damage per attack, effectively mitigating chip damage over time. Less effective against heavy single-instance physical bursts.
